title: APF Paper 4 — Admissibility Constraints and Structural Saturation
description:
Field content and fermion spectrum of the Standard Model: 45 fermions in three generations, the 1-of-4680 admissible template, mass-ratio structure, Cabibbo angle, CKM matrix structure. Currently PDF-only; .tex source pending.

This repository is the executable mathematical appendix for Paper 4 of the Admissibility Physics Framework (APF). All theorems trace to named check functions in the bundled apf/ package.

creators.name: Brooke, Ethan
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, San Anselmo, California, USA
